title: Back to Blocks
description: Turn slabs, stairs, walls and carpets back into their block variants!
body:
Turn any slabs, stairs, walls or carpets back into their block variants:

Slabs: 2 slabs vertically for 1 block

Stairs: 4 stairs in a square for 3 blocks

Walls: 4 walls in a square for 3 blocks

Carpets: 3 carpets vertically for 1 block
